libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For com.github.victools 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 types in test code, especially `tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode`; do not import the old `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode` package.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is a configuration module for the core SchemaGenerator and declares jsonschema-generator with provided scope, so tests need the generator API explicitly to exercise the module.
The module derives schema attributes from Swagger v3 @Schema and @ArraySchema annotations and declares swagger-annotations with provided scope.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Version 5.0.0 is a breaking release with minimum Jackson 3.x and Java 17; old Jackson 2 imports will fail javac even though jackson-databind is present transitively through jsonschema-generator.
Adding an explicit Jackson 2 dependency would not fix coverage and may create incompatible JsonNode types.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The Swagger 2 module is not meaningfully usable standalone: its POM marks both the core jsonschema-generator and swagger-annotations as provided, so tests need them explicitly. Version 5.0.0 also moves the generated schema JsonNode type to Jackson 3.
